title: melissa × bolnokensis
intro: Melissa × bolnokensis, also known as lemon balm, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Melissa officinalis and Melissa × calendulaefolia. It possesses medicinal properties due to the presence of rosmarinic acid, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Melissa × bolnokensis include its ability to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, reduce stress and promote relaxation, and its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of cold sores and other skin infections. Herbal preparations of Melissa × bolnokensis include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to soothe the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
